docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GELLERMAN, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT SHADOIAN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
